scenario.problem: Release delays (from 2/week to 1/month) due to regression bugs. Code Climate score dropped to 1.5, Test Coverage at 55%. Cyclomatic complexity in the payment routing engine peaked at 22.

implementation.refactor_strategy: Dedicated Tech Debt Sprints. The routing engine was isolated using the Strangler Fig pattern into a microservice.
implementation.testing_strategy: Introduced mandatory coverage gates in CI/CD (>80% required for new code). Comprehensive E2E tests added to the legacy monolith boundary.
implementation.documentation: Documented the updated bounded-contexts using C4 model.

results.release_cadence: Restored to 3 releases per week with zero severity-1 rollbacks in Q4.

lessons: Incremental refactoring (Strangler Fig) is far less risky and more sustainable than attempting a complete "Big Bang" rewrite of a critical financial monolith.
Automated metrics (SonarQube) in the CI pipeline prevent the re-accumulation of debt by blocking bad PRs automatically.
anti_patterns: Ignoring debt for business pressure: 'We will fix it later'. Accumulation of debt creates a compound interest effect, making future modernization exponentially more expensive.
